EXECUTIVE SUMMARY ----------------- The Aquila platform consolidates incident telemetry, asset registers, customer notices, and compliance evidence across regional substations. This corpus is synthetic but structured like enterprise knowledge-base material.

RETRIEVAL TARGETS ----------------- RAG systems should retrieve exact policy language, numeric thresholds, named exceptions, code snippets, dates, and owner mappings. Some facts are repeated with slight variations to test deduplication and source ranking.

KNOWN AMBIGUITIES ----------------- The term 'feeder' may refer to an electrical feeder, a data ingestion feeder, or a Kafka feeder service. The term 'breaker' may refer to circuit breaker hardware or software circuit breaker logic.

blocks.text: Q: What is the escalation time for P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters? A: Escalate to GridOps within 10 minutes; regulator within 45 minutes if restoration exceeds 2 hours. Q: How long are hourly aggregated metrics retained? A: 7 years. Q: Can AI triage directly assign a crew? A: No. Human dispatchers must confirm safety classification first.

blocks.text:
| Policy ID | Policy | Exact Rule | Owner | Evidence Required |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `P-001` | Critical outage escalation | P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters must be escalated to GridOps within 10 minutes and to the regulator within 45 minutes if restoration estimate exceeds 2 hours. | GridOps Lead | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
| `P-002` | Data retention | Raw telemetry is retained for 18 months. Aggregated hourly metrics are retained for 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports must expire after 30 days. | Data Governance | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
| `P-003` | Maintenance freeze | No non-emergency transformer maintenance may be started during the June peak-load freeze window unless approved by both Operations and Compliance. | Maintenance Director | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
| `P-004` | Password rotation exception | Service accounts used by field gateways rotate every 90 days, except offline substations in satellite mode which rotate at the next successful sync within 14 days. | Security Engineering | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
| `P-005` | Model-assisted triage | AI triage suggestions are advisory. Human dispatchers must confirm safety classification before a field crew is assigned. | Service Desk Manager | ticket, approval note, timestamp |
